% This is generated by ESQL's StGeometryTypeTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Example

```esql
ROW wkt = [
    "POINT(1.0 2.0)",
    "LINESTRING (30 10, 10 30, 40 40)",
    "POLYGON ((30 10, 40 40, 20 40, 10 20, 30 10))"]
| MV_EXPAND wkt
| EVAL geometry = TO_GEOSHAPE(wkt),
       type = ST_GEOMETRYTYPE(geometry),
       points = ST_NPOINTS(geometry)
| KEEP type, points
```

| type:keyword | points:integer |
| --- | --- |
| ST_Point | 1 |
| ST_LineString | 3 |
| ST_Polygon | 5 |
